decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

No drift. oEmbed probe of all 10 assets: 9 PUBLIC Shorts still HTTP 200 (v1_hook, v1_twist, v2_hook, v1_answer, v2_twist, v2_answer, v3_hook, v3_twist, v3_answer); the lone SCHEDULED Short v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, 06-15 12:00Z) returns HTTP 403 = not-yet-public, consistent with SCHEDULED. State file matches reality — yesterday's reconcile of 5 stale-SCHEDULED entries held. No Shorts publish TODAY (06-14), so nothing to verify in Studio this run.

Not a real publish day: 06-14 is a nominal long-form Sunday per cadence, but the next long-form (v4 Roanoke) is targeted 2026-06-22 per runs/v4-roanoke/SHORTS_PLAN.md and is still mid-production (script WRITTEN; voice/assets/render/thumb/shorts/upload all pending + unresolved Google Flow Nano-Banana-2 submit blocker). Today's Sunday long-form slot is intentionally empty during the v4 ramp. PIPELINE THIN: only 1 Short staged ahead (v1_bonus_briggs 06-15). Next 3 days — 06-15 Mon HOOK slot FILLED (scheduled, verified), 06-16 Tue empty, 06-17 Wed ANSWER slot EMPTY (recovery cadence = HOOK Mon + ANSWER Wed). ACTION: resolve v4 render pipeline + Flow thumb blocker well before 06-22; stage a Short for the 06-17 slot or accept a HOOK-only week.

Reddit seed for v4 Roanoke (CROATOAN / Lost Colony) drafted + staged at seeds/v4_roanoke_reddit_seed.md (~620 words, r/UnresolvedMysteries). No YT link in body (KNOWN_BAD anti-spam); link goes in first top-level comment ~5min later with utm_source=reddit. POST on v4 ship day Sun 2026-06-22 ~17:00 UTC, not today. Logged to LEARNINGS.md.
